messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0065",
  "title": "海外各地区移动游戏收入占比分布",
  "page_index": 20,
  "page_range": "20"
}

Section text:
## 海外各地区移动游戏收入占比分布

message.content: This section addresses the geographic distribution of mobile game revenue across overseas markets. It is structured to answer questions regarding which international regions contribute to mobile gaming revenue and their respective percentage shares. Key entities include overseas geographic regions and the mobile game industry. The primary metric is revenue share (percentage). The heading implies the presence of a supporting figure or table visualizing regional breakdowns, though no specific data, dates, definitions, procedures, or detailed claims are provided in the text. The expected evidence type is quantitative market data presented in a chart or table format.
